email.subject: Employee portal profile page throws an error
email.body: Bug report: managers cannot save profile updates in the employee portal. The page fails with an error after clicking Save and onboarding is blocked.

email.subject: Please add approver delegation to the policy workflow
email.body: Change request: please add temporary approver delegation to the document approval workflow so policy packets keep moving during leave coverage.

email.subject: Need corrected payroll variance export before Friday
email.body: We need the payroll variance export fixed before Friday's board reporting pack. Finance is blocked until the totals reconcile correctly.

email.subject: FYI: onboarding portal metrics for March
email.body: FYI only. Sharing the monthly onboarding portal adoption metrics. No action needed, just keeping the team informed.

email.subject: Thanks for the workflow cleanup
email.body: Thank you for cleaning up the approval queue yesterday. Everything looks good now and no follow-up is needed.

email.subject: Can we revisit first-day access in the portal?
email.body: Can we revisit first-day access in the employee portal this sprint? New hires are still blocked during onboarding when they try to open their checklist.
